endpoints.label: Add User Channel

fields.label: Host
fields.description: Host of your Mattermost server, e.g. app.example.com (no https:// prefix)

fields.label: Channel Name or ID
fields.description: The ID of the channel to invite user to. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fields.label: User Name or ID
fields.description: The ID of the user to invite into channel. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

endpoints.description: Add a user to a channel

fields.label: Host
fields.description: Host of your Mattermost server, e.g. app.example.com (no https:// prefix)

fields.label: Team Name or ID
fields.description: The Mattermost Team. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fields.label: Display Name
fields.description: The non-unique UI name for the channel

fields.label: Name
fields.description: The unique handle for the channel, will be present in the channel URL

fields.label: Type
fields.description: The type of channel to create

fields.label: Host
fields.description: Host of your Mattermost server, e.g. app.example.com (no https:// prefix)

fields.label: Channel Name or ID
fields.description: The ID of the channel to soft delete. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

endpoints.label: Member Channel

fields.label: Host
fields.description: Host of your Mattermost server, e.g. app.example.com (no https:// prefix)

fields.label: Team Name or ID
fields.description: The Mattermost Team. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fields.label: Channel Name or ID
fields.description: The Mattermost Team. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fields.label: Resolve Data
fields.description: By default the response only contain the ID of the user. If this option gets activated, it will resolve the user automatically.

fields.label: Return All
fields.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

fields.label: Limit
fields.description: Max number of results to return

endpoints.description: Get a page of members for a channel

fields.label: Host
fields.description: Host of your Mattermost server, e.g. app.example.com (no https:// prefix)

fields.label: Channel ID
fields.description: The ID of the channel to restore

fields.label: Host
fields.description: Host of your Mattermost server, e.g. app.example.com (no https:// prefix)

fields.label: Team Name or ID
fields.description: The Mattermost Team. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fields.label: Search Term
fields.description: The search term for Channels in a Team

fields.label: Return All
fields.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

fields.label: Limit
fields.description: Max number of results to return

fields.label: Host
fields.description: Host of your Mattermost server, e.g. app.example.com (no https:// prefix)

fields.label: Channel Name or ID
fields.description: The ID of the channel to get the statistics from. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

endpoints.label: Delete Message

fields.label: Host
fields.description: Host of your Mattermost server, e.g. app.example.com (no https:// prefix)

fields.label: Post ID
fields.description: ID of the post to delete

endpoints.description: Soft delete a post, by marking the post as deleted in the database

endpoints.label: Post Message

fields.label: Host
fields.description: Host of your Mattermost server, e.g. app.example.com (no https:// prefix)

fields.label: Channel Name or ID
fields.description: The ID of the channel to post to. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fields.label: Message
fields.description: The text to send

fields.label: Attachments
fields.description: The attachment to add (JSON object; supported keys: actions, author_icon, author_link, author_name, color, fallback, fields, footer, footer_icon, image_url, pretext, text, thumb_url, title, title_link)

fields.label: Other Options
fields.description: Other options to set (JSON object; supported keys: root_id)

endpoints.description: Post a message into a channel

endpoints.label: Post Ephemeral Message

fields.label: Host
fields.description: Host of your Mattermost server, e.g. app.example.com (no https:// prefix)

fields.label: User Name or ID
fields.description: ID of the user to send the ephemeral message to. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fields.label: Channel Name or ID
fields.description: ID of the channel to send the ephemeral message in. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fields.label: Message
fields.description: Text to send in the ephemeral message

endpoints.description: Post an ephemeral message into a channel

endpoints.label: Create Reaction

fields.label: Host
fields.description: Host of your Mattermost server, e.g. app.example.com (no https:// prefix)

fields.label: User Name or ID
fields.description: ID of the user sending the reaction. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fields.label: Post ID
fields.description: ID of the post to react to. Obtainable from the post link: https://mattermost.internal.n8n.io/[server]/pl/[postId]

fields.label: Emoji Name
fields.description: Emoji to use for this reaction

endpoints.description: Add a reaction to a post

endpoints.label: Delete Reaction

fields.label: Host
fields.description: Host of your Mattermost server, e.g. app.example.com (no https:// prefix)

fields.label: User Name or ID
fields.description: ID of the user whose reaction to delete. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fields.label: Post ID
fields.description: ID of the post whose reaction to delete. Obtainable from the post link: https://mattermost.internal.n8n.io/[server]/pl/[postId]

fields.label: Emoji Name
fields.description: Name of the emoji to delete

endpoints.description: Remove a reaction from a post

endpoints.label: Get Many Reaction

fields.label: Host
fields.description: Host of your Mattermost server, e.g. app.example.com (no https:// prefix)

fields.label: Post ID
fields.description: One or more (comma-separated) posts to retrieve reactions from

fields.label: Return All
fields.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

fields.label: Limit
fields.description: Max number of results to return

endpoints.description: Get many reactions to one or more posts

fields.label: Host
fields.description: Host of your Mattermost server, e.g. app.example.com (no https:// prefix)

fields.label: Password
fields.description: The password used for email authentication

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: first_name, last_name, locale, nickname, notificationUi)

endpoints.label: Deactive User

fields.label: Host
fields.description: Host of your Mattermost server, e.g. app.example.com (no https:// prefix)

fields.label: User ID
fields.description: User GUID

endpoints.description: Deactivates the user and revokes all its sessions by archiving its user object

fields.label: Host
fields.description: Host of your Mattermost server, e.g. app.example.com (no https:// prefix)

fields.label: Email
fields.description: User's email

fields.label: Host
fields.description: Host of your Mattermost server, e.g. app.example.com (no https:// prefix)

fields.label: User IDs
fields.description: User's ID

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: since)

fields.label: Host
fields.description: Host of your Mattermost server, e.g. app.example.com (no https:// prefix)

fields.label: Return All
fields.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

fields.label: Limit
fields.description: Max number of results to return

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: inChannel, inTeam, notInTeam, notInChannel, sort)

fields.label: Host
fields.description: Host of your Mattermost server, e.g. app.example.com (no https:// prefix)

fields.label: Team Name or ID
fields.description: Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression

fields.label: Emails
fields.description: User's email. Multiple emails can be set separated by comma.
